NOTICE OF HEARING PETITION FOR RELEASE OF LIEN (CC 3154, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER THE MICHAEL J. NILAND TRUST, CREATED BY DECLARATION OF TRUST DATE 5/5/04, MICHAEL J. NILAND TRUSTEE HEARING SET FOR APR-01-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER THE MICHAEL J. NILAND TRUST, CREATED BY DECLARATION OF TRUST DATE 5/5/04, MICHAEL J. NILAND TRUSTEE

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THE MICHAEL J. NILAND TRUST, PETITION FOR RELEASE OF LIEN (CC 3154). HEARING HELD AND ARGUED. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: PETITION FOR RELEASE OF MECHANIC'S LIEN IS GRANTED. ALSO, PETITIONER'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL DETERMINE THE CORRECT AMOUNTS. PETITIONER LODGES PROPOSED ORDER WITH THE COURT, WITH AMOUNTS FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS LEFT BLANK FOR THE COURT TO ENTER. JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR # 5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Petition For Release Of Lien (Cc 3154
Off Calendar Apr-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THE MICHAEL J. NILAND TRUST, Petition for Release of Lien (CC 3154). Appearances: Rolando Pasquali, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 579-0100 appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Brian Leach, Esq. of Leach & McGreevy, LLP (415) 775-4455 appearing for Respondent and opposing party. Hearing held and argued. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules as follows: Petition for release of Mechanic's lien is granted. Also, Petitioner's motion for attorney's fees and costs is granted. The Court will determine the correct amounts. Petitioner lodges proposed Order with the Court, with amounts for attorney's fees and costs left blank for the Court to enter. (302/PHA)Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR # 5797
